title: columnea citriflora
intro: Columnea citriflora, also known as the 'Orange Columnea', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Gesneriaceae family. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its antitussive and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Columnea citriflora include its antiviral and antibacterial properties, which can help boost the immune system and fight off infections. Columnea citriflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
